description_long: This is a large, horizontally-oriented cylindrical storage tank with rounded end caps and a weathered, industrial appearance. The tank is primarily a muted beige color, featuring a prominent red horizontal stripe running along its length near the base. Three circular red access hatches or covers are evenly spaced along the top of the tank, suggesting points for inspection or filling. The tank is elevated above the ground by two sturdy metal support stands, which provide stability and clearance. The surface shows signs of wear and exposure, with visible texture and some discoloration, indicating outdoor use. This type of tank is commonly used for storing liquids or gases in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, beige cylindrical storage tank with red hatches and a red stripe, supported by metal stands and showing signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded end cap, red stripe, and the first of three red hatches on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tank, all three red hatches, the red stripe, and both support stands.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the rounded end cap, red stripe, and the last red hatch visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the tank's length, three hatches, red stripe, and support stands.
